Home / Service Areas / Louisville

Chiropractor in Louisville, CO

Trusted local professionals serving Louisville and surrounding communities

Serving Louisville, CO

Onyx Chiropractor provides expert chiropractic care to the families and professionals of Louisville, CO. Our gentle techniques are ideal for patients of all ages, from children to seniors. Many Louisville residents visit us for relief from back pain, neck discomfort, and sports injuries while maintaining their active Colorado lifestyles. We understand the unique needs of Louisville's community, offering flexible scheduling for busy parents and working professionals. Our clinic specializes in treating common issues like poor posture from desk work and repetitive strain injuries. Let us help you stay pain-free while enjoying all that Louisville has to offer.

Louisville combines small-town charm with excellent schools and a thriving downtown district.

Chiropractor Services in Louisville

Spinal Adjustments

Precision techniques to improve alignment and relieve pressure on nerves.

Learn more →

Sports Recovery

Specialized care for athletes dealing with repetitive strain or impact injuries.

Learn more →

Posture Correction

Solutions for tech workers and students combating 'Boulder hunch' from screens.

Learn more →

Pediatric Chiropractic

Gentle care for Boulder's active kids and growing families.

Learn more →

Auto Injury Recovery

Comprehensive care for whiplash and other collision-related injuries.

Learn more →

Senior Wellness

Gentle techniques to maintain mobility and independence.

Learn more →

Prenatal Care

Specialized support for Boulder moms-to-be.

Learn more →
